quotes.author: Socrates
quotes.quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing

quotes.author: Nikola Tesla
quotes.quote: "Be alone, that is the secret of invention; be alone, that is when ideas are born".

quotes.author: Oscar Wilde
quotes.quote: "Be yourself; everyone else is already taken."

quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci
quotes.quote: "Painting is poetry that is seen rather than felt, and poetry is painting that is felt rather than seen".

quotes.author: Albert Einstein
quotes.quote: Imaginația este mai importantă decât cunoașterea, pentru că cunoașterea este limitată, iar imaginația îmbrățișează întreaga lume.
